items.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro now targeted for July 17 launch
items.summary: Google is aiming to finally ship Gemini 3.5 Pro on July 17 after missing its original June I/O and June 30 targets, citing token-efficiency and long-horizon reasoning fixes requested by enterprise testers.

items.title: Anthropic extends free Fable 5 access through July 12
items.summary: Paid Claude plans keep no-extra-cost access to the restored Fable 5 model a few days longer than first announced, now cutting off at 11:59 PM PT on July 12.

items.title: Claude in Chrome graduates to general availability
items.summary: The browser extension that lets Claude Code and Cowork build, click through, and debug web apps directly in Chrome or Edge has moved from preview to GA.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple's lawsuit accuses OpenAI and two former Apple hardware engineers of exploiting a storage-access bug and recruiting practices to accelerate its push into consumer AI devices.

items.title: Anthropic finds a hidden "thinking space" inside Claude
items.summary: A new interpretability tool called the J-lens uncovered a workspace where Claude holds concepts it never puts into words, which researchers can use to catch hidden goals or fabricated reasoning.

items.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 and folds Codex into ChatGPT
items.summary: The new GPT-5.6 model family powers a fresh ChatGPT Work agent, and the standalone Codex app has merged into the ChatGPT desktop app as a dedicated coding tab.

items.title: Codex Remote and Goal mode reach general availability
items.summary: You can now start or steer Codex sessions from the ChatGPT mobile app and set persistent, multi-day objectives across the Codex CLI, IDE extension, and app.

items.title: Gemini's AlphaEvolve agent reaches general availability
items.summary: The Gemini-powered algorithm-discovery agent is now GA on Google Cloud, letting businesses hand it a baseline algorithm and goals to autonomously find optimized code.
